programme.title: Tango Charlie
programme.desc: Tarun, a BSF officer, along with his battalion gets deployed to Kargil when a war between India and Pakistan breaks out. This is where Tarun faces the life-threatening challenge.

programme.title: Bhoot
programme.desc: A married couple rents a beautiful, spacious apartment at a ridiculously cheap price only to find out that it is haunted. What follows is a series of eerie and hair-raising supernatural episodes in the house.

programme.title: Jaan-E-Mann: Let's Fall in Love... Again
programme.desc: To avoid paying a hefty alimony, Suhaan (Salman Khan) thinks of getting his ex-wife Pia (Preity Zinta) remarried. For that, he convinces Pia¡¯s simpleton college friend Agastya Rao (Akshay Kumar) that he can still marry his college crush. He then helps Agastya to woo Pia, but ends up falling in love with her all over again.

programme.title: Shoorveer
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Nayaki
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Citizen
programme.desc: Antony assumes several identities and kidnaps three government officials in order to succeed in his secret mission. However, a CBI officer sets out to find the real identity of the kidnapper.

programme.title: Patas
programme.desc: South Station

programme.title: Diamond Cartel
programme.desc: Only one lusted glance brings Aliya to the events throwing her into the criminal ocean. But in the wirliging of passions and turmoil when she finds herself at the verge of fatality it's only her true love that is the only rescue.Now the most important thing for Aliya is to preserve the honor and dignity and the whole world will be at our feet.

programme.title: If is a Big Word
programme.desc: It seems to the 35-year-old Yekaterina Kolesnikova that her life got on to the wrong track: instead of being a model on the catwalk in Milan she works in a factory making working clothes. And her husband, a once brilliant and talented musician, has turned out to be a local finance officer. But now Fate suddenly gives Katya a chance to go back seventeen years and try to change her life. Will it make her happy?

programme.title: Photo ID
programme.desc: When Ania and Vlad married they were impoverished

programme.title: Dandelion
programme.desc: Two of the most prosperous families in town – the Adrianovs and the Zeldovs - are preparing for the marriage of their children, an advantageous match and a union that promises to benefit both families' business interests. The day before the wedding celebrations are due to commence, the groom, Rodion Andrianov, meets a plain ‘dandelion' blonde girl Sonia under unusual circumstances when the elevator in which they are both traveling suddenly breaks down.

programme.title: Captive
programme.desc: Yelena Diagileva, an ambitious businesswoman, dreams of rising to the top of the career ladder when she encounters an unexpected problem - she will have to 'win over' her boss's son in order to get her long-awaited promotion. Lena is almost ready to compromise her principles and forget about her husband, who prefers to sit quietly by the fire every evening, when disaster suddenly strikes, and Lena is abducted by a serial killer, Rodion.

programme.title: Crash Point Zero
programme.desc: An explorer and his daughter discover a deadly doomsday device in Siberia.

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: Prof. Lehman discovers in his Mexican observatory earth is about to be hit by asteroid 114 Kassandra.

programme.title: Crash Point Zero
programme.desc: An explorer and his daughter discover a deadly doomsday device in Siberia.

programme.title: Flash Gordon
programme.desc: Dolan sends Flash on a quest to Frigia to rescue the queen, who's been encased in ice.

programme.title: Meteor
programme.desc: The new debris shower even hits the HQ, all satellite communications go down.

programme.title: Hit-and-Run Squad
programme.desc: Min-jae, a rookie police officer with a natural born talent for driving, is assigned to the perfect team: the Hit-and-Run Squad. But at the same time, for police detective Si-yeon, it is a place she is unjustly demoted to for doing her job. The two team up to arrest the rich and powerful speed maniac Jae-chul who is suspected of committing crimes for his obsession for speed.

programme.title: Midnight Runners
programme.desc: Ki-joon and Hee-yeol become best friends at the police academy, despite differences in their personality. During their outing, they witness a kidnapping incident and report it to the police right away. However, because of the lack of evidence, the investigation doesn't progress while precious time is being wasted. Ki-joon and Hee-yeol decide to take the investigation into their own hands. The only problem is they have zero experience in a real investigation.

programme.title: Anonymous
programme.desc: Artemis and Cash set out to take down a child sex trafficking ring and, in doing so discover Artemis' long lost son, only to find there are grave consequences that may cost them their lives and the ones they love. Unbeknownst to Artemis, the hard core enforcer, Olivier (Ernest L. Thomas -What's Happening, Malcolm X, Everybody Hates Chris) is also searching for the boy and willing to do anything to find him.

programme.title: The Final Countdown
programme.desc: A modern aircraft carrier is thrown back in time to 1941 near Hawaii, just hours before the Japanese attack on Pearl Harbor.

programme.title: Anjaana Anjaaani
programme.desc: The film of two strangers, who meet on a bridge intending to commit suicide. After bonding over their shared miseries,they make a pact to live life to the fullest for the next 20 days and explore various adventures together. As they embark on this trip, they begin to develop feelings for each other, leading to a complex and emotional journey. Will they embrace their new-found love or stick to their original plan?

programme.title: Love Sex Aur Dhoka
programme.desc: An Indian anthology film that tells three separate but interconnected stories revolving around the themes of love, sex, and betrayal. The film is shot in a found-footage style, utilizing surveillance cameras, mobile phones, and webcams to capture the stories of individuals from different backgrounds, whose lives are intertwined in unexpected ways. It explores the dark side of relationships and the impact of technology on modern romance.

programme.title: Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyar
programme.desc: Gangotri Pictures Pvt. Ltd's Ye Kaisa Pal Do Pal Ka Pyaar is a love story that's set in a village. Seema (Lovely Joshi), who is a daughter of a high caste Pandit Deendayal, falls in love with an educated Dalit boy Nikhil (Uttam Kumar. When Pandit Deendayal doesn't approve of their love, the two lovers elope, only to be chased by Pandit Deendayal's henchmen, whom Nikhil kills one by one. Amidst all this, there is also a parallel story that speaks of an enmity between Pandit Deendayal and Thakur Surendra Singh Rana, whose enmity gets further fanned up by two villagers Abdul and Malkhi.

programme.title: Gumnaam The Mystery
programme.desc: An aspiring actress, Ria who models and acts in music videos is offered a lead role in a film by casting director Rishi Gandhi. However, when she arrives at the director's mansion, she begins to realise that things are not as they seem.

programme.title: Kudrat Ka Kanoon
programme.desc: When Vijay is falsely imprisoned, his wife and daughter are condemned by the society.

programme.title: Sultanat
programme.desc: Sultan, a brave warrior, swears revenge against a general who murdered his father.

programme.title: Agni Vayu
programme.desc: Agni Vayu Is A Romantic Thriller That Tells The Story Of A Young, Vibrant Dr. Agni And An Ambitious Investment Banker Vayu. As Their Love Blossoms, An Unfortunate Turn Of Events Happens That Throws Them Amid Conspiracy, Misunderstanding, Swindling, And All Sorts Of Paradoxes At Every Turn. They Set Out On A Journey To Unravel The Mystery Surrounding These Events. Can They Both Solve It Together And Will They Disclose Their Feelings To Each Other During The Journey.

programme.title: Dhartiputra Nandini
programme.desc: Dhartiputra Nandini Tells The Story Of A Farmer Girl Who Wants To Stay Connected To Her Land. At The Same Time, Akash Returns From America. Sumitra Devi Wishes That His Grandson Akash Should Take Over The Entire Business By Becoming “Ceo.” At The Same Time, Her Family Is Falling Apart, And She Needs An Ideal Daughter-In-Law Who Understands The Responsibility Of Being Her Daughter-In-Law. She Sees Nandini As That, But Akash Refuses To Accept Her Since She Is Not Educated. Nandini Proves That She Is The Best, Both As A Supporter And A Life Partner. She Is There For Akash'S Family In Every Circumstance. This Is The Journey Of “Dhartiputra Nandini” From “Life Partner For Life” To “Charioteer.” In Addition, She Manages His Business. Nandini Also Fulfills Akash'S Dreams And Makes The Name Of The Country Known To The Entire World

programme.title: Crime Files
programme.desc: It All Begins Around Us This Crime Show Explores Crimes That Occur Within Our Own Communities And Among People We Know. It Tells The Compelling Stories Of Ordinary Lives Disrupted By Crime, With Relatable Characters Representing The World Around Us. The Show'S Mission Is To Raise Awareness About Crime Prevention While Keeping Viewers Engaged And Intrigued."

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A mysterious accident on Christmas Eve leaves Tony Holden with a fatal neck injury, but the case goes unsolved when Rod Demery reopens the investigation, he discovers a conspiracy between unlikely accomplices.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: The cold-blooded execution of an affable middle-aged couple sends shock waves of fear through their normally quiet community clues are scarce until Demery and Mayfield uncover a cache of threatening text messages from a pair of mysterious numbers.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A 911 dispatcher is found slumped behind the wheel of a wrecked sedan with a bullet through his torso to catch the killer, Rod Demery must retrace the victim's steps and untangle a web of accusation and innuendo spun by a shady cast of characters.

programme.title: Murder Chose Me
programme.desc: A family man is gunned down while doing a favor for a friend as Rod Demery searches for answers, he's confronted with a name from his past and an all too familiar tragedy when more blood is spilled, Demery is pushed to his breaking point.

programme.title: Dates From Hell: Blood Red Proposal

programme.desc: Jerry grows into a giant after wearing a special ring gadget. Jane tries to evade him but is eventually captured and carried around like a toy. She manages to escape by using the ring to shrink Jerry back to his normal size. They reconcile, and Jane playfully throws the ring away, bringing an end to their giant-sized adventure.

programme.title: The I Wish I was a Ninja
programme.desc: Despite psammy's help, Cyril wants a real teacher to teach him to become a ninja

programme.title: The Seagull Invasion
programme.desc: Jane and Jerry try to shoo the seagull out of the house, but it continues to flyaround, causing more chaos. The seagull starts to take over the house, making itselfat home and pus_hing Jane and Jerry out.The two siblings come up with a plan totake back their home

programme.title: The I Wish I could talk Seagull
programme.desc: After psammy accidentally hurts a seagull, he relunctantly agrees to speak seagul

programme.title: Hide and Seek
programme.desc: is a lively and comedic story of Jerry's birthday celebration. Jane surprises Jerry with a cake, but playfully keeps it out of his reach, leading to a chase around the house. Amidst the chaos, the cake ends up on the fan, creating further obstacles. Jerry and Jane search desperately for the cake, leading to a comical scene of mistaken discoveries. As the clock strikes midnight, signaling the end of Jerry's birthday, they become disheartened. However, a spontaneous cake mishap involving the fan brings laughter and joy to both characters, turning the situation into a hilarious and memorable moment

programme.title: Jerry the Golfer
programme.desc: Jane sets up the golf ball and takes a shot, which perfectly lands in the hole.Jerry takes a shot, but the ball barely moves.Jerry hits the ball, and it flies off, breaking a window

programme.title: The Never Movie
programme.desc: peter is fascited when the Darling children show him an adventure film.

programme.title: The Wild Melodies
programme.desc: Powerkids Kartoon Channel

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Monster plan S2 Ep 25
programme.desc: The crazy scientist, Doctor Rex Vector, and his hamster assistant, Mister Pete, return to Pine Tree Mountain with Vector's new, evil invention: a robo-monster complete with animal abilities. But first, Vector needs to collect these skills. He comes up with a power absorbing gadget, which he often disguises, in order to trap and steal abilities from the innocent animals. Vick, Briar and Bramble, along with other animal friends, must stand up against this “monster plan” of Vector's. It's going to be a fierce fight between wild animals and poaching villains.

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Bust Ep 21

Their latest adventures take our heroes out of the forest and into the big city, where they make new friends and a host of wonderful discoveries...and where they learn a few fabulous new tricks for escaping the clutches of the villainous Vick!

programme.title: Bablu Dablu Sunsational Summer Ep 21
programme.desc: Bablu Dablu: Sunsational Summer is the latest installment in the rip roaring adventures following Briar and Bramble in their hilarious quest to stop Logger Vick's tree cutting antics. These summer episodes take our favorite characters on all new adventures through underwater chases, surviving the great outdoors, meeting new monsters, and many more exciting hijinx. The bear brothers and all of their friends unite again to save their home and teach Vick and all of us the importance of working together to protect our forest.

programme.title: Paper Tales
programme.desc: Animation series “Paper Tales” narrate to children audience in fascinating way amusing adventures of paper animals – a moose named Aristotle and a woodpecker named Knock-Knock – in paper land where everything is made only from paper. Merry adventures come together with entertaining insets “for crafty hands” when the audience learns how to produce all cartoon characters using paper, cardboard, scissors and glue. The project is supported with the site where all flat patterns are provided with the advices how to manufacture the paper world items.This is the way spectator gets involved into a peculiar game that brings out creative work and development of many useful practical skills, distracting kids from permanent attachment to a computer. The “Paper Tales” project is a fascinating and helpful alternative to computer-oriented pastime. The whole cartoon is accompanied by off-screen narrator's text and exuberant flow of gags. Each episode is planned to last for 5 minutes (a version without insets – 4 minutes). Technique of performance is 3D computer graphics imitating paper application work.

programme.title: Woodventures
programme.desc: " Woodventures" is an animated series for preschool children. The main characters are wooden toys: Kitty Meow, Doggy Woof-Woof, Piggy Oink, Horsey Yee-Ho-Ho and Elephant Pawoo. The toys live in a small wooden town (the prototype of a child' s play room). Every toy has its own unique personality and reacts to different circumstances appropriately. With the help of the invisible narrator, the toys, along with the audience solve different tasks, play and take part in adventures. " Woodventures" is a musical series with lots of songs and dances. Some of the songs represent our characters and appear in each series, and some of the songs are related to the events in the series, so it is only found in that particular episode.Each episode presents a playful and learning environment.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: The Adventures of Peter and Wolf
programme.desc: A sitcom about the adventures of ordinary schoolboy Peter and talking Wolf connecting the world of people to parallel universes, where there live robots and vampires, werewolves and zombies, giants and aliens, fairies and centaurs, clones and invisible men! The characters will have to solve locals' problems and regularly save the world.

programme.title: Magic Lantern
programme.desc: Animation series “Magic Lantern” tells little viewers wonderful adventure stories, based on classic literature plots. Little video games fan Mike and his smart sister Kate watch and discuss each story presented as a strip film. Funny stories will help seeing classic stories from the new side and prove that world classic literature is exciting and interesting.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city's sewers transform into Indiana Jones' white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you've entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Back to Back
programme.desc: Embark on an electrifying journey as they boldly leap from one heart-pounding expedition to the next, fueled by their unbreakable bond and insatiable thirst for excitement. Get ready to be swept away in a whirlwind of adrenaline-pumping quests, where danger and discovery await them at every turn.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.title: I' ll Get You! Holiday
programme.desc: The action takes place in all year round resort, where Wolf doesn' t chase Hare to eat him anymore: now it' s all about sports and competition. However, in his crazy chase after recognition and victories the grey hooligan often uses methods that aren' t really fair, which provokes awkward and funny situations.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn' t! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can' t help being sucked in by Moose' s relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: Pincode
programme.desc: Grown up Kikoriki characters rock the world with their scientific superpowers and tell the kids scientific facts in a most entertaining way. The crew follows Captain Pin as they learn about the world we live in and share this knowledge with us.

programme.title: Robocar POLI
programme.desc: The courageous and swift police car POLI, the powerful fire engine ROY, the intelligent AMBER, and the flying HELLY are all here to save the day!

programme.title: Kungfu Master Of Zodiac Ep 40
programme.desc: Welcome to 12 Zodiac Way! This is a story of the twelve animals of the Chinese Zodiac like you've never seen them before! Come journey with us to a charming little town called Fortune Valley, where the twelve animal-totems now associated with the Chinese lunar calendar spend their days frolicking merrily, often joining together to pursue a host of colorful projects and plans.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: The hotel owner Hartacker rallies the population against the crocodiles. He claims that the animals have killed a boy. But he himself is hiding the child. At first, the campaign is successful...

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: Milly wants to surprise her father with a cake for his birthday. But while she is trying to mix the batter, the mixer gives up the ghost. But that's no reason for Milly to give up. She repairs the mixer and gives it to her father for his birthday along with the birthday cake. No wonder her father is delighted,

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: In search of the next Boom Cart, the kids land on the planet Gaffa. But immediately after landing, they are attacked by vicious Larvites...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Our four heroes make their way to Paul Revere.

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Hurakan is holding Mara Mei captive. The chief is not to see her again until he agrees to her marriage! Bob and his friends must free Mara Mei...

programme.title: Mission Odyssey
programme.desc: Lord Kann, the evil ruler of the goblins, is terminally ill. Daiman and Balabust know only one way out: they kidnap Fala, the healer of the elves, to cure Kann.

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Lupo rents out his attic room, but the lady is not quite right and has evil intentions. / Grandma Eusebia asks F&F to take her dog to the groomers, but Schnucki doesn't want to go to the cleaners. / F&F and her uncle go on vacation, but their luggage is stolen on the train. / An unwanted driving lesson for Lucky

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Crocodile Jazz becomes the owner of an inflatable rubber nightclub. Cockatoo Ajax is to be the main attraction. That's why Hartacker goes completely crazy.

programme.title: Marvellous Milly
programme.desc: When Milly suddenly falls ill and the doctor is called, she is completely desperate. She doesn't want to swallow the yellow medicine because she knows how disgusting it tastes. But with the help of a new gummy putty that her father has developed, she manages to make a chocolate spoon that makes swallowing the medicine even sweeter.

programme.title: Shadow of the Elves
programme.desc: Lord Kann, the evil ruler of the goblins, is terminally ill. Daiman and Balabust know only one way out: they kidnap Fala, the healer of the elves, to cure Kann.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: Like her friend Millicent, Gloria wants to go to the ballet. She doesn't believe that Gloria will manage to get into the class. But not only does Gloria get in, she also gets a part...

programme.title: Da Boom Crew
programme.desc: The Da Boom crew land on the scrap planet after a battle. They need a few spare parts to repair their ship. But the inhabitant of the junkyard, Zurge, doesn't want to help the kids...

programme.title: Bob's Beach
programme.desc: Bob actually wanted to dig his way back to New York. But in the process he comes across an old treasure map. Together with Nel and Zaza, he sets off in search of Wirwindi's treasure...

programme.title: Adventurers Masters of Time
programme.desc: Agents try to ruin the lives of the Queen and Shakespear.

programme.title: Gloria s House
programme.desc: One day, a sleeping boy called Slick lies in Milly's bed. Slick has run away from home and is now roaming around the neighborhood. Milly accuses the boy of stealing from her...

programme.title: Fix & Foxi Show
programme.desc: Uncle Fax has a toothache but doesn't want to go to the doctor / The friends go cycling and Lupo ends up in a cave. A Stone Age man finds the children / The cinema owner is ill and the small children are unhappy. The four friends want to help. / In the middle of the night, mom hears noises and sends the not at all brave men of the house to investigate. A rumbling surprise awaits them.

programme.title: Crocadoo
programme.desc: Hotel manager Hartacker tries to intimidate the crocodiles with a ghost show. But they see through his evil plan...

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: Brothers Max & Benj Cave are challenged to create a run through an abandoned water park on the island of Gran Canaria.

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: Brothers Max & Benj Cave are challenged to create a unique run in an unusal setting on the Island of Jamaica.

programme.title: Running the World
programme.desc: In this episode the boys look back over their time spent in Portugal India Mexico Gran Canaria and Jamaica.

programme.title: Inside Oranje U21
programme.desc: Jong Oranje is up for their biggest challenge so far. In the quarter finals of the Euro's they face tournament favorite France. Striker Myron Boadu is set for the biggest moment of his career and the camera is right there when it happens.

programme.title: Inside Oranje U21
programme.desc: In the semi-finals of the Euro's Under 21, Jong Oranje will stand face to face with an old friend Germany. The two teams drew 1-1 earlier in the tournament. Will the masterplan of coach Erwin van de Looi secure the Orange boys a place in the final?

programme.title: Kung Fu Wise
programme.desc: Kleber travels to Foshan and seeks out masters of two different lineages: Ip Man and Snake Style. First he visits the Ip Man lineage, based on the legendary kungfu master whose life story spawned hundreds of martial arts movies.

programme.title: Kung Fu Wise
programme.desc: In Foshan, Kleber seeks out Liu Weixin, a master of Pak Mei kungfu and on whom the hit game "Sifu" was based. He experiences this style's relentless and lightning-fast strikes, but also learns from its master how to balance life and kungfu.

programme.title: Kung Fu Wise
programme.sub-title: Kungfu-wise: Hung Ga & Choy Li Fut
programme.desc: In Foshan, China, Kleber meets with two masters of southern Chinese martial arts. He learns from a Hung Ga master and meets a master of Choy Li Fut, a kungfu style that utilizes everyday items such as towels, fans and even abacuses.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: Meet Nigel McNally and the team from Kestrel Beer who has hopes of breaking the land speed record in a restored 1930'a Riley Kestrel 9.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: The record attempt is only one week away and everything seems to be on track, until the results of a dyno test put a spanner in the works.

programme.title: The Flying Kestrel
programme.desc: The official press launch of The Flying Kestrel at legendary racetrack, Santa Pod. The Kestrel team is joined by Victor Riley of Riley Cars, and celebrity Rachel Riley.

programme.title: Geared Up
programme.desc: An ultra rare 1957 Mercedes Benz 300 SL Roadster is resto-modded using a modern Mercedes Benz SLK 230 as a donor vehicle.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Normal is not enough. Tuning is a way of life for many car fans - the search for ever more horsepower, better sound and extraordinary design.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: The Monza Rally Show is a classic among drift shows. Plus: a Mercedes G-Class becomes a special off-roader 'ORC Bull'. And: a Mini Countryman becomes a Dakar Rally competitor.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: Porsche is like a religion! The faiths: Punk, technology and racing. Porsche punk Magnus Walker preaches individualism for historic vehicles. Technology has been embodied by Alois RUF since 1983. And for the racers, there is the GT3 RS.

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: BMW tries to combine the electric future with fuel-saving features in the i8. In addition: the 'Race Chip' is tested on a 3,000-kilometre route. And: What is the benefit of the switchable performance enhancement from DTE Systems?

programme.title: Tuning
programme.desc: They are the US car icons par excellence: Chevy, Ford Mustang and Corvette. At Race 61, fans of historic racers pay homage to their heroes. And: we explore the history of the Ford Mustang up to the current model.

programme.title: Harley-Davidson Trio
programme.desc: O Dyna Switchback, o Sportster 72 e o Softail Slim

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Podczas All-Wheel Adventure w Bad Kissingen, największej wystawy dla offroadowców w Europie, testowaliśmy Defendera Rallye i sprawdzaliśmy, jak zwykły Jeep Wrangler z kilkoma modyfikacjami może podwoić swoją cenę. Ponadto: jak mały Fiat Panda 4x4 radzi sobie na islandzkich wyżynach. Także: Defender Bowler firmy Land Rover i sześciokołowiec Volvo - Laplander.

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Un día en la nevada Austria en un Suzuki SX4 S-Cross

programme.title: 4x4
programme.desc: Wycieczki po okolicy nie są jedyną opcją dla samochodów z napędem na cztery koła. Dużo frajdy można mieć również na drogach szutrowych. Pokazujemy, jak to się robi w Subaru WRX STI. Ponadto: w latach 90-tych Ford z powodzeniem startował w międzynarodowych rajdach samochodowych modelem Ford Escort RS Cosworth. Oraz: Volkswagen Polo WRC pokazuje swoje umiejętności 4x4 w Rajdowych Mistrzostwach Świata.

programme.desc: The exclusive classic car rally Arabella Classics.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.desc: Die-hard Porsche fan Marco Wendlandt makes his dream come true: driving a 1984 Porsche 911 coupe. With the help from Big Mike, a car dealer from Los Angeles, he tracks down the car in San Francisco.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: Porsche Outlaw Magnus Walker - Los Angeles
programme.desc: With his newly bought Porsche 911 coupe, Marco heads to L.A. to meet one of the best known Porsche enthusiasts of the world: Magnus Walker, who invites Marco to visit his workshop and his collection.

programme.title: Motorstories
programme.sub-title: Car Tales from California's High Desert
programme.desc: On his way to Las Vegas Marco drops by Big Mike in the Apple Valley. Together they meet Big Mike's friends from the Kustos family, who once used to be trendsetters in the Californian car customizing scene.

programme.title: Pawn Stars
programme.desc: Rick Harrison and his family purchase, sell and evaluate items with fascinating stories.

programme.title: Sharanam
programme.desc: Sharanam takes viewers on a poignant journey to some of the most revered pilgrimage sites in India to and highlights the traditions, practices, rituals and ideals that bring people to these holy places in search of something greater than themselves. Narrated by Bollywood actress Juhi Chawla, Sharanam showcases testimonies of personal incidents that are the bedrock of the belief, and follows the strong thread of faith that not only binds the pilgrims to their Gods, but also the nation with itself.

programme.title: Eco India
programme.desc: Eco india challenges natural conflicts with inter-human solutions as they reflect sustaining self and surrounding. From “Changing Flora and Fauna”, Urban Visions being Sustainable”, “Greening Up- creating solutions for greenhouse and global warming” leading us to know how we could “Help Nature, Help Humanity”. As they go head on with “Protecting Seafood and ocean life”, “Addressing industrial Pollution” , land pollution , water pollution , modern solutions to hazardous pollutants, tackling food and water shortage , Recycling batteries, sustainable ways of life , protecting environment with modern and technological development issues and many more to create a better world.

programme.title: Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha
programme.desc: After the resounding success of the first two seasons, EPIC Channel presents a revamped avatar of its Raja Rasoi series. EPIC Channel's Raja Rasoi series - titled Raja Rasoi Aur Andaaz Anokha - stands true to its name. While the lore and love of Indian food remains just as passionate, the new season presents a discovery oriented show format that transforms table-top cooking into an exciting food lab. Featuring renowned chef Ranveer Brar, the show will take you to his retreat – an old-world bungalow basking in the laidback vibe of Goa and then along on a ride nostalgia and rediscovery both personal and culinary. Ranveer's passion for culinary art makes him a perfect fit as the host for the latest season of the food series. He has dedicated this experimental streak and passion for food to his mentor – Munir Ahmed, a quaint, ordinary yet passionate food enthusiast from the gullies of Lucknow who greatly influenced Brar while growing up in his hometown.

programme.title: Regiment Diaries
programme.desc: The Indian Army is an emotion – a living chronicle of events, that we have the luxury to forget because they remember. The army itself is a family of several regiments, each of which has its own history, identity, and glorious traditions. Regiment Diaries is a tale of the Indian Army unlike any told before. Told by the very men who follow the illustrious feats of their predecessors, it tells timeless tales that warm the heart, moisten the eye, and leave you in awe of the bravest children of India.

programme.title: Mid
programme.desc: Veteran actor, Naseeruddin Shah, explores the many untold stories of Indian cricket. He recalls the history of the game match highlights. Sportsmanship, stadiums, hits and misses, and many more. In his unique narrative style, Naseeruddin Shah brings alive the humorous side of the game, along with undocumented anecdotes and quirky trivia. The show also features many personalities who narrate cricketing experiences and stories including Shashi Tharoor, Narl Contractor, Bishan Singh Bedi and Charu Sharma amongst others

programme.title: Indipedia
programme.desc: A light and peppy anchor driven half-hour episodic series that explores the reasons, bellefs and logic behind the customs and rituals observed as a norm In India, often so casually that most of us have never really asked why they arethe way they are.

programme.title: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik
programme.desc: Devlok With Devdutt Pattanaik: A Show That Explores Indian Mythology In A Manner Never Attempted Before. Renowned Mythologist Devdutt Pattanaik Dips Into Subjects Through Lesser-Known Tales And Narratives, While Attempting To Explore And Interpret The Questions That Arise From The Treasure Trove That Is Indian Mythology. With An Easy And Unassuming Storytelling Style. Devdutt Pattanalk Demystifies Mythology In Easy-To-Understand, Everyday Language In This Unique Series That Brings Ancient Stories To Life In A Contemporary Context. Each Episode Takes Viewers On A Fantastic Voyage Through Myriad Characters, Events, Stories, Symbols, And Rituals That Form The Basis Of Identity For The People Of The Subcontinent.

programme.title: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral in Varna, Bulgaria
programme.desc: The Dormition of the Mother of God Cathedral is the largest cathedral of Varna and one of the most impressive sites in the city. With its height of 38 meters, the Dormition of the Mother of God is one of the tallest churches in Bulgaria and certainly one "&"of the most important in the country's long history.

programme.title: Sveti Juraj, Montenegro
programme.desc: Sveti Đorđe Island is one of the two islets off the coast of Perast in the Bay of Kotor, Montenegro. Unlike Gospa od Škrpjela, it is a natural island.

programme.title: Tauric Chersonesos, Crimea
programme.desc: 528 BC. in the west of the Heracles Peninsula, the Dorian Greeks founded the city of Chersonesus in Crimea, which means "peninsula". Founded as a colony of the wealthy Greek city of Heraclea of Pontus, its history is part of the Ancient Greece, Ancient Rome and Byzantium. In the Middle Ages, Chersonesus was called Kherson.

programme.title: Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, Italy
programme.desc: Hidden in the hills of Italy lies Palazzo Ducale di Urbino, the Ducal Palace of Urbino. It may seem strange to find such grand Renaissance architecture outside of the great cities. We all know about Rome, Venice, Florence and their great works. But the Ducal Palace of Urbino is often forgotten, despite rivaling all of them with its splendor and great history.

programme.title: Kursi, National Park, Israel
programme.desc: We are 30km west of Jerusalem, on the border between the Judean Mountains and the Ayalon Valley, in the village of Nicopolis. You may know it better as Emmaus. Here, thanks to its strategic position, Emmaus has played an important role in the country's administrative, military and economic life many times in its history.

programme.title: Marmashen Monastery, Armenia
programme.desc: Here we are: in a beautiful valley on the left bank of Akhurian River, 10 km northwest of the city of Gyumri, 2 km southwest of the village of Vahramaberd in the Shirak region in Armenia. We are at Marmashen Monastery. Surrounded by fruit orchards this magnificent monument once was a prominent cultural and religious center and is considered as the finest example of the medieval architecture of Armenia…

programme.title: San Nicolo dei Mendicoli, Italy
programme.desc: Venice, the dream city in the north of Italy! It is located on 118 islands in the Venetian lagoon, separated by 150 canals and channels with about 400 bridges. Known as the Floating City or the City of Canals, Venice is a true monument city. The church of"&" San Nicolo dei Mendicoli is a historical and artistic achievement, inseparable from the Venetian heritage.

programme.title: Punta Del Este, Uruguay
programme.desc: With sprawling beaches, iconic monuments and a unique mix of colonial and modern architecture, it is the jewel of Uruguay's southern coast. Often called the “Pearl of the Atlantic”, likened with Miami and Cannes, it is the city of Punta del Este.

programme.title: HOTELS in Rio de Janeiro
programme.desc: Would you prefer a prestigious palace, an eco-lodge in the middle of the jungle, a charming villa or a design temple in an urban setting? LUXURY DREAMS takes you on a voyage of discovery of rare addresses, always top luxury, often quite unusual. Today direction Paris in France (Part 3)

programme.title: Saschiz Old Town, Romania
programme.desc: Saschiz, village, and commune, Mureș județ county is located in central Romania. The villages of Saschiz, Mihai Viteazu, and Cloașterf make up the larger commune of Saschiz. Located in the old region of Transylvania, it lies about 20 km east of Sighișoara"&". First documented in the 14th century, Saschiz is known for its medieval fortress and church constructed by Transylvanian Saxons, a German speaker. They settled in Transylvania when it was part of Hungary. The ruins of the 14th-century fortress sit atop "&"a hill overlooking the village. The late 15th-century fortified church has Gothic details and an imposing clock tower. Along with five other villages with fortified churches, Saschiz was inscribed on UNESCO's World Heritage sites in 1999.

programme.title: Andros Town, Andros Island, Cyclades, Greece
programme.desc: Known for its shipowners, captains, and countless treasures, the Island of Andros has been away from mass tourism for years, which works to its advantage!

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: Beach Battles

programme.title: One Perfect Day in Kentucky
programme.desc: In "One Perfect Day in Kentucky," BFF's Kimberly and Elsa bring their shared competitive streak to the Bluegrass State, facing off to find out who can plan the perfect Kentucky day. Each is determined to delight - and outdo - the other with unforgettable experiences that showcase the state's rich culture. Elsa kicks off the competition with a classic Kentucky breakfast, a recipe she learned from top Chef Ouita Michel at her Holly Hill Cooking Studio. Elsa wins the first point, but Kimberly's ready to up the ante, whisking Elsa away for a thrilling cave kayaking adventure at the Gorge Underground. As they ride the chairlift to the top of the stunning Natural Bridge, the rivalry kicks into high gear and they go head-to-head in a trivia battle. The next surprise – a toast with Kentucky's own Ale-8 soda , sourced by Kimberly straight from the factory only whets their whistles. At the Keeneland Racetrack they sip some spirit forward Keeneland Breezes while Elsa reveals all she has learned about racehorses from a visit to renowned trainer Mark Simms Jr. ‘s horse barn. A Betologist gives them a quick lesson on wagering and Kimberly's horse wins the race. At Louisville's Trouble Bar, Kimberly shares her newfound knowledge of Kentucky bourbon production from a tour and tasting at Castle + Key distillery and makes Elsa One Perfect Drink.

programme.title: Four Corners

programme.title: Samantha Brown Places to Love: Brooklyn
programme.desc: When you think New York City, you probably envision Manhattan. Yet a lot of the city's heart and soul resides in Brooklyn. As one of the five boroughs in the USA's largest city, Brooklyn is actually quite huge. But don't let the size alarm you—this borough has a low-key, neighborhood vibe that's devoid of the Manhattan hustle. Add in diverse neighborhoods, great food and unexpected businesses, and Brooklyn is a place to love.
